name: Space Shooter / Shmup Starter
description: Vertical or horizontal scrolling shoot-em-up with wave-based enemy spawning, player ship with bullet systems, boss fights, power-ups, and particle effects. Features formations, collision detection, and progressive difficulty.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x project file with render canvas textures enabled, physics set to 2D, default scene: res://scenes/level.tscn

scenes/.player_ship.tscn: CharacterBody2D player with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D (capsule), gun_emitters (Node2D x2 for dual shot), cooldown timer
scenes/.bullet.tscn: Area2D projectile with Sprite2D (small white circle), CollisionShape2D (circle), lifetime timer, velocity property
scenes/.enemy_basic.tscn: CharacterBody2D basic enemy with Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, gun_emitter (Node2D), health value (10 HP), bounty (10 gold)
scenes/.enemy_formation.tscn: Node2D formation container with 5x enemy_basic.tscn instances positioned in V-shape pattern, formation_timer for synchronized movement
scenes/.boss.tscn: CharacterBody2D boss with large Sprite2D, CollisionShape2D, 100 HP, multi_gun_emitters (5 Node2D for spread pattern), phase_state_machine (phase 1/2/3), phase_timer
scenes/.powerup.tscn: Area2D powerup with Sprite2D (star shape, color-coded), AnimationPlayer for rotation, type property (spread_shot/shield/speed_boost)
scenes/.explosion.tscn: Node2D with CPUParticles2D (white-to-yellow gradient, 1 second lifetime), AudioStreamPlayer2D for explosion SFX
scenes/.level.tscn: Node2D root scene with: CanvasLayer (background with parallax TileMap), Node2D (gameplay), CanvasLayer (HUD), wave_spawner (wave_manager.gd), player instance, enemy_container (Node2D)
scenes/.hud.tscn: CanvasLayer with Label (score), Label (lives), Label (wave #), Label (enemy count), TextureProgressBar (boss health, hidden until boss spawns)
scenes/.game_over.tscn: CanvasLayer with ColorRect (black background), Label (Game Over text), Label (Final Score), Button (Restart), Button (Main Menu)

scripts/.player.gd: CharacterBody2D script: velocity property, move_speed (300), rotation towards mouse, shoot on input (Space), dual_fire with cooldown (0.15s), emit bullet from gun_emitters, screen_clamping on edges, collision detection vs enemies (hurt with knockback)
scripts/.bullet.gd: Area2D script: velocity property, lifetime (5s), damage (10), on_area_entered signal detects enemy/boss/obstacles, emits explosion, queues_free
scripts/.enemy_base.gd: CharacterBody2D script: max_health (10), current_health, velocity property, movement_speed (150), patrol_pattern (sin wave or linear), shoot_interval (1.5s), shoot method spawns enemy_bullet, on_hit(damage) decrements health, on_death emits signal and spawns powerup (30% chance), queues_free
scripts/.wave_manager.gd: Node2D script: wave_number (starts 1), enemies_spawned_this_wave, spawn_timer, wave_config list {wave_num, enemy_count, enemy_type, spawn_interval, formation_enabled}, spawn_wave method instantiates enemies in sequence or formation, wave_complete signal emitted when all enemies defeated, next_wave_timer (5s intermission), difficulty_scaling (health +5%, speed +10% per wave)
scripts/.powerup_manager.gd: Node script: spawn_powerup(position, type) method creates powerup instance, on_powerup_collected signal passes type, apply_effect(type) to player: spread_shot = dual_fire + quad_fire (7s duration), shield = immunity 5s, speed_boost = 1.5x speed 10s
scripts/.score_manager.gd: Node script: current_score, multiplier, on_enemy_defeated(bounty) adds bounty*multiplier, on_powerup_collected increases multiplier, on_boss_defeated(1000) large bonus, update_ui signal emits score value
scripts/.audio_manager.gd: Node script: bgm_player (AudioStreamPlayer), sfx_effects dict {shoot, hit, explosion, powerup, boss_spawn}, play_sfx(key) and play_bgm(stream) methods

assets/.sprites/: player_ship.png (64x64 triangle shape), enemy_basic.png (32x32 red square), boss.png (128x96 large enemy), bullet_player.png (8x8 white circle), bullet_enemy.png (6x6 red circle), powerup_spread.png (32x32 star blue), powerup_shield.png (32x32 shield gold), powerup_speed.png (32x32 flash yellow)
assets/.audio/: bgm_level.ogg (looping background music), sfx_shoot.wav (laser sound), sfx_hit.wav (explosion), sfx_powerup.wav (chime), sfx_boss_spawn.wav (deep rumble)

preBuiltMechanics: CharacterBody2D-based player movement with rotation-to-mouse aiming
Bullet spawning system from gun emitters with configurable fire rate and spread patterns
Wave-based enemy spawner with difficulty scaling and formation patterns (V-shape, lines, grids)
Area2D collision detection system for bullets, enemies, and powerups
Boss fight with multi-phase system (phase triggers on health thresholds, attack pattern changes)
Particle-based explosion effect on entity death
Power-up drops with temporary stat modifications (spread shot, shield, speed)
Score tracking with kill bounties and wave multipliers
Lives/health system with game over detection
Enemy AI with simple patrol patterns and rhythmic shooting
customizationPoints: Adjust move_speed, fire_rate, bullet_damage, and enemy_health in scripts for difficulty tuning
Add new enemy types: create new_enemy.gd inheriting enemy_base.gd with custom movement patterns and attack sequences
Customize power-up effects by editing apply_effect method in powerup_manager.gd
Modify wave_config list in wave_manager.gd to define custom spawn sequences, formation types, and boss encounter triggers
Replace Sprite2D assets with custom ship/enemy/bullet graphics (must maintain collision shape proportions)
Add visual effects: screen flash shader on boss hit, barrel roll animation on player movement
Implement difficulty modes: Easy/Normal/Hard change enemy_health and wave_config spawn_interval
Create new boss types as separate scenes inheriting boss.tscn with custom attack patterns
examplePrompts: Create a horizontal scrolling shmup with 5 waves of increasing difficulty, each introducing a new enemy type with unique attack patterns.
Add a power-up system that grants temporary triple-shot and invincibility frames, with on-screen indicators showing duration remaining.
Implement a boss with 3 attack phases: bullet spray, homing missiles, and screen-filling laser; switch phases at 66% and 33% health.
Design a formation spawner that creates enemy squadrons in V-shape, cross, and circle patterns, each with synchronized shooting.
Add particle effects for bullet impacts, enemy explosions (spawn 20-30 particles), and power-up collection (golden star burst).
Create a score multiplier system that increases for consecutive kills without being hit, resetting on damage taken.
Implement a mini-boss encounter every 3 waves with higher health (50 HP) and aggressive firing patterns before final boss.
